name: 8-bit LFSR (maximal-length)
description: A clean-room 8-bit Fibonacci LFSR (polynomial x^8+x^6+x^5+x^4+1, period 255) taken spec -> lint -> simulation -> GDS on the SkyWater sky130hd PDK entirely through the platform.
highlights: Full flow to GDSII on sky130hd (OpenROAD/ORFS)
Timing met: WNS 0.0 ns; 21 std cells
Self-checking testbench: maximal-period 255 + no all-zero lockup PASSED
Interactive: open lfsr8.dashboard.html to watch the real netlist shift in your browser
source_note: Clean-room spec + RTL/TB; authored by dogfooding SiliconCrew locally (native iverilog sim + local ORFS synth).
